data.title: Noronex Expands Copper-Silver Finds at Fiesta Project in Namibia
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Noronex Ltd. ( (AU:NRX) ) has issued an announcement.

Noronex Limited has reported significant copper-silver mineralization at its Fiesta Copper Project in Namibia, with a major 500m step-out confirming extensive mineral deposits. The company plans to further explore these promising findings with diamond drilling, aiming to expand and define the system’s potential, which could significantly enhance its industry standing and stakeholder value.

More about Noronex Ltd.

Noronex Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of copper and silver projects. The company primarily engages in activities within the Kalahari Copper Belt in Namibia, targeting significant mineral deposits to enhance its market position.

YTD Price Performance: 60.0%

Average Trading Volume: 741,871

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$7.99M

data.title: Sunshine Metals Initiates Drilling at Tigertown to Expand Gold Resource
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Sunshine Gold Ltd ( (AU:SHN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Sunshine Metals Limited has announced the commencement of drilling at the Tigertown site, part of the Ravenswood Consolidated Project. Following recent mapping and sampling that revealed significant gold and silver mineralization, the company aims to define a shallow gold resource near its existing Liontown resource. The announcement highlights Tigertown’s potential to enhance Sunshine’s portfolio and strengthen its position in the mining sector, offering promising implications for stakeholders.

More about Sunshine Gold Ltd

Sunshine Metals Limited, traded as ASX:SHN, operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold and silver exploration and production, with significant projects including the Ravenswood Consolidated Project in Queensland.

Average Trading Volume: 2,109,690

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Strong Buy

data.title: Equinox Gold and Calibre Mining Merge to Form Leading Gold Producer
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Equinox Gold ( (TSE:EQX) ) has shared an update.

Equinox Gold Corp. has entered into a definitive arrangement agreement with Calibre Mining Corp. to merge and form a major Americas-focused gold producer. The new entity, retaining the Equinox Gold name, is set to become the second largest gold producer in Canada, with significant production capabilities and a robust asset base. The merger is expected to enhance Equinox’s market presence, with a projected gold output of over 1.2 million ounces annually, bolstered by high-quality Canadian mines and a promising pipeline for growth. The combined company’s market capitalization is estimated at C$7.7 billion, with strategic leadership from renowned industry figures.

More about Equinox Gold

Equinox Gold Corp. is a leading gold producer in the Americas, focusing on gold mining operations with a portfolio of diversified assets. The company is known for its low-cost, long-life Canadian gold mines and holds a significant presence in the market through its extensive gold reserves and development projects.

YTD Price Performance: 28.44%

Average Trading Volume: 6,198,039

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.1B

data.title: Synagistics Launches Reality TV Show to Boost Live Commerce
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

HK Acquisition Corp. ( (HK:2562) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Synagistics Limited has announced the launch of a new reality TV show, SuperStreamer Asia, aimed at boosting the live commerce market by showcasing the talents of aspiring live streamers. This initiative combines entertainment, e-commerce, and technology, starting in Singapore and expanding across Southeast Asia. Supported by Shopee, the show will blend reality TV with live streaming, providing participants the opportunity to enhance their skills and audience reach. The collaboration with Shopee underscores a shared commitment to nurturing live streaming talent and advancing digital commerce, reinforcing Synagistics’ position in the industry and expanding its collaborative efforts in the region.

More about HK Acquisition Corp.

Synagistics Limited operates Synagie, a leading data-driven digital solutions provider in Southeast Asia. Since 2016, Synagie has empowered over 600 brand partners, including Nike and Estée Lauder, with comprehensive integrated solutions to enhance the e-commerce experience. The platform operates through direct-to-brands and direct-to-consumers models, utilizing AI-driven technologies to optimize retail experiences. Synagistics is recognized for its commitment to innovation, sustainability, and digital transformation, having achieved carbon neutrality and expanding its market footprint across China and Spain.

YTD Price Performance: -13.55%

Average Trading Volume: 918,749

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$22.49B

data.title: Patagonia Lithium Announces Strategic Funding Initiatives
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Patagonia Lithium Limited ( (AU:PL3) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Patagonia Lithium Limited has announced a strategic financial maneuver involving a private placement and an entitlement offer to raise funds for its ongoing projects. The company will issue 12.5 million shares to Magnus Capital S.A., raising A$1 million, and conduct a pro-rata non-renounceable entitlement offer to raise approximately A$2.56 million. The funds will support the completion of a drilling program in Argentina, update a Mineral Resource estimate, and provide general working capital. The entitlement offer is fully underwritten by Dr. Jose Manzano, who will also nominate a new board director, signaling a strengthened position for Patagonia in the resource sector.

More about Patagonia Lithium Limited

Patagonia Lithium Limited operates in the energy sector, focusing on lithium mining and energy transition projects. The company’s market focus includes expanding its investment portfolio in publicly and privately owned mining and energy transition projects.

data.title: Iltani Resources Announces Exploration Target for Orient East Deposit
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

An update from Iltani Resources Ltd. ( (AU:ILT) ) is now available.

Iltani Resources Limited has announced an Exploration Target for the Orient East deposit at its Orient Project, aiming to demonstrate the size and scale of the deposit as part of its journey towards a Mineral Resource Estimate. The Orient East Exploration Target is set between 25-35 million tonnes at 77-95 g/t Ag Equivalent, with high-grade core material identified. This development is a strategic move to enhance the company’s position in the mining sector, with plans to restart drilling operations in March 2025 and produce initial Mineral Resource Estimates for both Orient West and East within the year.

More about Iltani Resources Ltd.

Iltani Resources Limited is a company involved in the exploration of silver and base metals. The company focuses on its 100%-owned Orient Project located in North Queensland, where it seeks to define significant mineral resources.

data.title: AVJennings in Acquisition Talks with Ho Bee Land and AVID
data.description:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Avjennings Limited ( (AU:AVJ) ) just unveiled an update.

AVJennings Limited is currently engaged in discussions with two separate parties, Ho Bee Land Limited and AVID Property Group, regarding non-binding proposals to acquire all outstanding shares. While the exclusivity period for both proposals has expired, due diligence is ongoing, and there is no certainty that a binding offer will emerge. AVJennings will continue to update stakeholders as developments occur.

More about Avjennings Limited

AVJennings Limited is a company involved in the property development industry, focusing on residential and community property projects.
